_doc: Curated technique-matrix for the empirical multi-stage CRAFT STUDY. Each objective runs a CONTROLLED single-variable A/B: the only thing that changes between its two techniques is the named stage (hires re-detail; LoRA stack). Baselines and treatments share ckpt, prompt, seed, base resolution — so any visible gain is attributable to the stage, not luck. Copy to docs/internal/image-craft-study/craft/manifest.json (gitignored images regenerate; this manifest + journal + catalog stay tracked). Asset names are LIVE rig names after the checkpoint-path move (fine-tunes bare at root; SDXL/ base+refiner keep the prefix). Re-resolve from /object_info before a run.

tricomposite.label: regional latent composition (3 regions -> 2 feathered composites -> unify pass)

objectives.positive: cinematic close-up portrait of a weathered fisherman, golden-hour rim light, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed skin texture and pores, sharp catchlight in the eyes, 85mm lens, photorealistic, masterful color grade
objectives.negative: blurry, plastic skin, waxy, extra fingers, deformed, lowres, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text, oversaturated

objectives.gain_under_test: hires re-detail on atmospheric depth + micro-texture
objectives.positive: epic alpine valley at sunrise, layered atmospheric depth, volumetric fog between ridgelines, dramatic god rays, a winding river catching the light, ultra-detailed, photorealistic landscape, wide cinematic vista
objectives.negative: flat lighting, hazy, washed out, lowres, oversimplified, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text, banding

objectives.gain_under_test: hires re-detail on product reflections + studio crispness
objectives.positive: premium commercial product hero shot, a sleek matte-ceramic coffee mug on a polished marble counter, soft three-point studio lighting, shallow depth of field, crisp specular reflections, advertising photography, clean negative space
objectives.negative: cluttered, busy background, lowres, distorted geometry, text, logo, watermark, jpeg artifacts, harsh shadows

objectives.gain_under_test: the dark-key LoRA stack (deep chiaroscuro, controlled low-key)
objectives.positive: low-key chiaroscuro portrait of a woman, single hard rim light from the side, deep crushed shadows, moody film-noir atmosphere, ultra-detailed, cinematic, fine grain
objectives.negative: flat even lighting, bright, washed out, plastic skin, lowres, deformed, watermark, text

objectives.gain_under_test: regional composition coherence (vertical world-axis, aerial->warm depth gradient)
